conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone.
new_constraint: Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone. Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions

Dear Curator,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to express my sincere interest in your gallery's programming and to inquire about any upcoming exhibitions scheduled for the next few months. As a dedicated follower of your work, I have long admired the unique curation and the distinct artistic vibes and funky aesthetics that characterize your recent displays.

Could you please provide details regarding any new shows, including the featured artists, exhibition dates, and whether there will be any accompanying public events or guided tours? Additionally, if there are opportunities for professional engagement or press coverage, I would appreciate any relevant information you might share.

Thank you for your time and for the continued excellence you bring to the art community. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Organization, if applicable]
[Your Contact Information]
